reviews.comment:
Paramos en el estacionamiento del YPF Full. Nos estábamos bajando de las motos y antes de que siquiera llegáramos a sacarnos los cascos. Salio el tipo del sector de la cafetería a decirnos que "si íbamos a consumir porque sino nos teníamos que ir".
Repito. AUN NO NOS SACABAMOS NI LOS CASCOS. Y Si , bamos a tomar un café porque llovía...
No se a quien se comió su empleado, para hablar de esa manera a un desconocido.
No recomiendo para nada. Ni nadie tiene porque bancarse sus malas caras
Hay 2 o 3 estaciones de servicio al rededor.
No vayan a esta

(Translated by Google)
We stopped at the YPF Full parking lot. We were getting off our motorcycles, and before we'd even taken off our helmets, the guy from the cafeteria came out and asked us if we were going to buy something, otherwise we'd have to leave.

I repeat, WE HADN'T EVEN TAKEN OUR HELMETS OFF YET. And yes, we were going to get a coffee because it was raining... I don't know what kind of person his employee is, to talk to a stranger like that. I absolutely do not recommend it. And nobody should have to put up with his bad attitude. There are two or three other gas stations nearby. Don't go to this one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkdWE3UXd3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Muyyyu vieja y pobre esa estación.
Falta modernizar todo el mobiliario del café. Cómo el ACA  de primitivo de la reta y San Martin

(Translated by Google)
That station is very old and shabby.
All the cafe furnishings need to be modernized. Like the ACA of Primitivo de la Reta and San Martin.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkbXRQblJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los precios dentro de todo accesibles lo que
si es mucho la tardanza de sector servicio mostrador.    Las 3 veces que fui fue un parto esperar , a ser atendida
Aunque fue en diferentes oportunidades y distinto personal fue igual la demora.
Y el caffe que venden es malo.    Ni sabor 😞
Después todo bien y normal de una estación

(Translated by Google)
The prices are reasonably priced, but the service at the counter is terrible. All three times I went, the wait to be served was a nightmare. Even though it was on different occasions and with different staff, the wait was always the same.

And the coffee they sell is bad. It has no flavor 😞 Otherwise, everything was fine and normal for a gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkN0tiUkxREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero el servicompras algo desprovisto, especialmente para ser del ACA. De todas formas, todo lo que ofrecen está muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the convenience store is somewhat lacking, especially for an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). However, everything they offer is very good.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar , con todos los servicios disponibles y buena atención por parte de su personal.
Punto y aparte para su bello paisaje, mientras disfruta de su variada gastronomía .
Super recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, with all amenities available and excellent service from the staff. The stunning scenery is a must-try, especially while enjoying the diverse cuisine. Highly recommended.
